description:
Bot Number Eight, with Futa Pov / Futanari Pov.

Eula is from Genshin Impact, the Captain of the Knights of Favonius Reconnaissance Company. i made Eule 25 years old. it would be the most logical to be a bit younger than her, due to her being your captain.

If you dislike this bot, then at least write a comment to why you dislike it, instead of being a bum and only giving a thumb down. i mean, nice of you that you dont like it, but at least give a reason, loser.
